series_metadata.series_title: Market Conduct Examination Files - Record Copy, Final Report
series_metadata.series_description: This series documents the Commission's examination of insurance company market conduct, financial status and other matters as required by Code of Virginia, §§ 38.2-1317 and 1317.1.

retention_rules.trigger_event: closure of examination, records Archives, Library of Virginia permanent retention (Code, § 38.2-1321). Public access record copy is unrestricted (Code, 38.2-1306)

series_metadata.series_title: Market Conduct Examination Files - Other Copies, Supporting Documentation and Ancillary Information
series_metadata.series_description: This series documents the Commission's examination of insurance company market conduct, financial status and other matters as required by Code of Virginia, §§ 38.2-1317 and 1317.1. This series includes information not included with the record copy of the final report.

retention_rules.trigger_event: closure of examination, in compliance with No. 8 on schedule cover page (Code, § 38.2-1320.5)

series_metadata.series_title: Market Conduct: Premium Finance Company Forms
series_metadata.series_description: This series documents the filing of agreement forms by insurance premium financers and subsequent approval by the Commission. Refer to Code of Virginia, § 38.2-4707.
